methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 2 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

private.name: QuantumScape
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Public), post-money $5B+

private.name: LanzaTech
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Public), post-money $800M+

data.narrative:
Brimstone is a public-stage Climate & Energy company founded by Cody Finke that has raised over $100 million. The valuation analysis operates within a fragmented comp universe of 21 same-sector peers, comprising 1 public company (LNZA) and 8 identified private competitors including QuantumScape, LanzaTech, TAE Technologies, Redwood Materials, and Helion.

The peer-median triangulation method is not applicable to this analysis. The Climate & Energy sector lacks a sufficiently dense peer set at Brimstone's stage; filtering for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier peers yields fewer than three datapoints, the minimum threshold for reliable median-based valuation. While 21 Climate & Energy peers exist in the broader sector, none meet the narrow stage and tier criteria required for defensible peer benchmarking. A sector-wide median would introduce unacceptable heterogeneity across vastly different technology maturity levels and capital requirements.

Without applicable triangulation methods supported by the data provided, a specific valuation range cannot be synthesized at this time. The analysis identifies a critical data gap: the comp set requires either (1) expansion of stage-adjacent or valuation-tier-similar peers with disclosed financials, or (2) application of alternative methods such as discounted cash flow or venture capital method calibration using Brimstone's specific financials and operating metrics. Key uncertainties include the precise public market comparability of LNZA and the financial depth of the private peer universe.
